fields.name: acquisitionDate
fields.description: The acquisition date or the acquisition date range.

fields.name: bbox
fields.description: The geographic search area expressed as a bbox string (decimal degrees values  separated by a comma). Values are min lon,min lat, max lon, max lat.

fields.name: cloudCover
fields.description: The cloud cover percentage or the cloud cover percentage range.

fields.name: commercialReference
fields.description: The commercial reference.

fields.name: constellation
fields.description: The constellation or constellation list (comma separated list). Possible values will be described in a future endpoint (*/api/v1/opensearch/domains/constellation*).

fields.name: geometry
fields.description: The geographic search area.

fields.name: incidenceAngle
fields.description: The incident angle or the incident angle range in degree.

fields.name: itemsPerPage
fields.description: The maximum number of items that the response can contain.

fields.name: page
fields.description: The requested page

fields.name: parentIdentifier
fields.description: The parent identifier (identified as sourceId in other catalogs)

fields.name: platform
fields.description: The platform or platform list (comma separated list). Possible values will be described in a future endpoint (*/api/v1/opensearch/domains/platform*).

fields.name: productType
fields.description: The product type or product type list (comma separated list). Possible values will be described in a future endpoint (*/api/v1/opensearch/domains/productType*).

fields.name: productionStatus
fields.description: The production status or production status list (comma separated list).

fields.name: publicationDate
fields.description: The publication date or the publication date range.

fields.name: q
fields.description: A generic query parameter, will search in productType and title. Search is in "contains" mode.

fields.name: resolution
fields.description: The resolution or the resolution range in meters.

fields.name: snowCover
fields.description: The snow cover percentage or the snow cover percentage range.

fields.name: sortBy
fields.description:
The order strategy for the items.

Accepted values are all opensearch attributes separated by a comma. Minus sign can be used to sort descending on the attribute. Otherwise the sort is ascending.

fields.name: sourceIdentifier
fields.description: The product identifier inside original referential

fields.name: workspace
fields.description: The workspace id/name or workspace id/name list (comma separated list)
